old: 他的亲爱的妻子去世了。
reason: Double 的 (他的亲爱的) is ungrammatical

old: 做事不能轻易，要认真考虑。
new: 做事不能轻易决定，要认真考虑。
reason: 轻易 is an adverb and cannot stand as a predicate; needs a verb to modify

old: You should not act rashly in matters; think them through carefully.
new: You should not make decisions rashly; think them through carefully.

old: When speaking, you should pay attention to degree and tone.
new: When speaking, you should pay attention to what is important and what is not.
reason: 轻重 means relative importance/seriousness, not 'degree and tone'

old: 这个问题由主任有权处理。
new: 主任有权处理这个问题。
reason: 由...有权处理 mixes two structures (由...处理 and 有权...处理) producing a broken sentence

new: 一群学生聚在图书馆学习。
reason: uses 群 in the internet chat-group sense, not the classifier sense being taught

new: A group of students gathered in the library to study.

old: 这个群里有很多热心的人。
new: 广场上有一群跳舞的老人。
reason: uses 群 in chat-group/internet sense; should illustrate classifier meaning

old: This group has many enthusiastic people.
new: There is a group of elderly people dancing in the square.

reason: 扇 as measure word for doors/windows is pronounced shàn (4th tone); 1st tone shān applies only to the verb 'to fan'

old: This commerce trip went very smoothly.
new: This business trip went very smoothly.
reason: 'Commerce trip' is unnatural English; 'business trip' is correct

new: 他努力工作，受到了主人的赏。
reason: headword 赏 absent; sentence uses 奖赏 instead

new: He worked hard and was rewarded by his master.
